rulings.Case Title: LOUISE DOUGLAS VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION

No opposition filed. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GLEN LEIS ET AL VS. AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Order Transferring And Notice Of Hearing
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 23, 2016, Line 4. DEFENDANT AJLOUN ENTERPRISES LLC, MATHEW ZGHOUL, IHSAN ZGHOUL, MUSAB ZGHOUL, MOHAMMED ZGHOUL Motion For Order Transferring And Notice Of Hearing is DENIED. This action concerning violation of landlord-tenant laws in regards to residential tenancy pursuant to a written contract is properly venued in San Francisco. CCP 393 and CCP 395. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AJLOUN ENTERPRISES, LLC VS. SERGEI KORJAVIN-URYSON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 23, 2016, Line 8. DEFENDANT SERGEI KORJAVIN-URYSON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer for, is not uncertain and there is no other case pending. Cause of action for nuisance is not addressed in the demurrer. =(501/REQ)
